iphone_device.when: showing an app or site on a real device (heavy WebGL/GLTF — cutaway only, capability-gated)

ios_home.when: an iOS home-screen / liquid-glass showcase (heavy WebGL)

notes: Heavy WebGL/GLTF device blocks are cutaway-only and capability-gated (render with --no-browser-gpu falls back to CSS/SVG if too slow on a fragile box). Most Liquid Glass beats are bespoke frosted plates over the aurora ground (see identity.css).
